title: Now Playing IRL
description: Display your real-life music in Minecraft!
body:
# Now Playing IRL ### Display your real-life music in Minecraft! [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-Fabric-blue?style=for-the-badge)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.4-green?style=for-the-badge)](https://minecraft.net/) [![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client-purple?style=for-the-badge)]() --- **Now Playing IRL** displays the music you're currently listening to on your PC directly in Minecraft! Supports **Spotify**, **YouTube**, **VLC**, **iTunes**, **foobar2000**, and many more players.
--- ## Features | Feature | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Real-time Detection** | Automatically detects music from Spotify, YouTube, VLC, and more | | **Album Art** | Fetches and displays album covers from iTunes/Deezer APIs | | **Rotating Vinyl** | Smooth rotating album art animation | | **5 Beautiful Themes** | Cherry Blossom, Purple, Ocean, Forest, Sunset | | **Fully Configurable** | Position, size, opacity, rotation speed | | **Idle Animation** | Cute "Silence... ♪ zzZ" when no music is playing | | **Ultra Lightweight** | Client-side only, 60 FPS optimized | --- ## Supported Players ### Fully Supported - **Spotify** (Desktop App) - **YouTube** (Chrome, Edge, Firefox) - **VLC Media Player** - **foobar2000** - **AIMP** - **MusicBee** - **Winamp** - **iTunes / Apple Music** ### Platform Support | Platform | Status | |----------|--------| | Windows | Full Support | | macOS | Spotify & Apple Music | | Linux | Via MPRIS (playerctl) | --- ## Configuration Open the config menu with `M` or through **Mod Menu**. | Option | Description | Default | |--------|-------------|---------| | **Position** | Widget corner position | Bottom Right | | **Scale** | Widget size (50% - 200%) | 100% | | **Opacity** | Widget transparency | 90% | | **Rotation Speed** | Album art spin speed | Normal | | **Show Album Art** | Display/hide cover | Visible | | **Theme** | Color scheme | Cherry Blossom | --- ## Installation 1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) for Minecraft 1.21.4 2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 3. Download **Now Playing IRL** and put it in your `mods` folder 4. *(Optional)* Install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for easy config access --- ## License This mod is licensed under **CC-BY-NC-4.0 License**.
